title: Diageo’s ‘Learning for Life’ Unveiled: A New Era for Nigerian Youths - FinancialEDGE
description: Diageo's Learning for Life" programme was officially unveiled at an event in Lagos, marking a significant milestone in the company's commitment to empowering Nigerian youths. The programme aims to equip young people with practical skills needed to succeed in the hospitality industry. The programme is designed to provide young Nigerians with the skills and knowledge
html: Diageo’s Learning for Life” programme was officially unveiled at an event in Lagos, marking a significant milestone in the company’s commitment to empowering Nigerian youths.
